banner.title: Reserve your table at Kalpataru Grand.
banner.subtitle: Planning a family brunch, group lunch, or special celebration? Let us know ahead of time.

experiences.title: Three ways to dine with us.
experiences.subtitle: Whether it's a quick breakfast or a leisurely lunch — we have the perfect setting.

items.name: First Floor Dining
items.summary: Spacious first floor restaurant with table service, warm lighting, and refined ambiance.

items.name: Rooftop Seating
items.summary: Open-air rooftop dining with a relaxed atmosphere and great views.

items.name: Private Dining Room
items.summary: Exclusive private dining space for group gatherings and celebrations.

form.title: Tell us about your reservation.
form.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll confirm your table. Brunch and lunch reservations recommended.
form.promise: We respond to every request. For immediate assistance, call us at +91 76769 90122.

items.title: Request received
items.description: Your details reach our team — we check availability for your preferred date and time.

items.title: Confirmation call
items.description: We call or message you to confirm your table and discuss any special requirements.

items.title: You're all set
items.description: Arrive at Kalpataru Grand and your table will be ready — first floor, rooftop, or private room.

items.title: Enjoy your meal
items.description: Relax in our cozy ambiance and enjoy pure vegetarian flavors. End with a filter coffee on us.
